title: MOSAIC: Multi-source Ocean Sensor And model Integration Catalogue
description: An open-source Python framework for declarative, reproducible integration of heterogeneous oceanographic data — satellite, numerical model, and in-situ observations — with automatic semantic harmonization, quality control, and content-addressable provenance recorded as STAC metadata. The repository accompanies the manuscript An Open Python Framework for Reproducible Multi-Source Ocean Data Integration: Three Case Studies from the Baltic, Atlantic and Arctic submitted to Computers & Geosciences, and ships the CS1 (Baltic coastal upwelling, July 2018) pipeline plus its companion notebook end-to-end.

creators.name: Gic-Grusza, Gabriela
creators.affiliation: Faculty of Oceanography and Geography, University of Gdansk, Poland

notes: Companion paper: Gic-Grusza & Bugaj, An Open Python Framework for Reproducible Multi-Source Ocean Data Integration, manuscript in preparation for Computers & Geosciences.
